title: Donkey Kong Country
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A single mine cart racing along a broken jungle track in a dense jungle ravine with wooden rails, deep foliage, and a bright gap ahead, caught one beat before the cart launches over a broken section.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- always rendered as pixel art
- crisp pixel edges, readable sprite-like shading, and controlled dithering when useful
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- wild, kinetic, jungle

Composition:
- single mine cart only, one clear rail path, layered jungle depth, and no character crowding the frame
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- pixel art only
- no text
- no watermark

Important safety constraints: create a fully original scene. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no box art, no screenshots, no UI, no recognizable branded mascots, and no direct copies of costume, weapon, creature, or symbol designs.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Kong likeness, avoid official barrel logos, avoid exact cart sprite shapes, avoid franchise lettering, avoid resemblance to donkey kong
revised_prompt: Create an original illustration that captures the essence of a retro platformer game. Visualize a single mine cart, one beat away from launching into the air, speeding on a broken jungle track amidst a dense jungle ravine, with wooden rails, dense foliage, and bright light peeking in from the end of the tunnel. The art style should be reminiscent of the SNES era with rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and controlled dithering, while also having a fresh and modern touch. The mood should be wild and energetic. Keep the composition simple, with only the mine cart and the jungle track taking up the frame. Limit the color palette, ensure high clarity and strong contrast in the image, and refrain from including any text or watermarks. Avoid replicating any copyrighted elements.
